channel.title: The Git Times
channel.description: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

item.title: NullClaw Delivers Tiny Zig AI Assistant for Any Hardware
item.description: “One accurate measurement is worth a thousand expert opinions.” — Grace Hopper

item.title: AI Agents Automate Frontier LLM Research on a Single GPU Overnight
item.description: “Those who can imagine anything, can create the impossible.” — Alan Turing

item.title: Antigravity Awesome Skills Arms AI Agents with 1,273 Battle-Tested Coding Playbooks
item.description: “Science is what we understand well enough to explain to a computer; art is everything else.” — Donald Knuth

item.title: AirI Unleashes Self-Hosted AI Companions That Play Games and Chat in Real Time
item.description: “At each increase of knowledge, as well as on the contrivance of every new tool, human labour becomes abridged.” — Charles Babbage

item.title: PinchTab Gives AI Agents Lightning-Fast Control Over Chrome Browsers
item.description: “The best programs are written so that computing machines can perform them quickly and so that human beings can understand them clearly.” — Donald Knuth

item.title: One CLI Masters Google Workspace APIs Dynamically for Devs and AI Agents
item.description: “Programs are meant to be read by humans and only incidentally for computers to execute.” — Donald Knuth

item.title: Open-Source World Monitor Delivers Palantir-Like Global Intelligence Dashboard
item.description: “In mathematics you don't understand things. You just get used to them.” — John von Neumann

item.title: Desloppify Harnesses AI Agents to Sculpt Sloppy Code into Beautiful Engineering
item.description: “Before you become too entranced with gorgeous gadgets, remember that the greatest invention of all was the book.” — Arthur C. Clarke

item.title: Reverse-Engineered APIs Unlock Neural Training on Apple Neural Engine
item.description: “Sometimes it is the people no one imagines anything of who do the things that no one can imagine.” — Alan Turing

item.title: Claude Context Mode Compresses Tool Outputs to Salvage AI Context Windows
item.description: “Premature optimization is the root of all evil.” — Donald Knuth

item.title: CoPaw Launches as Self-Hosted AI Assistant for Developers
item.description: “Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.” — Arthur C. Clarke

item.title: OpenClaw's memory-lancedb-pro Plugin Supercharges Agent Memory with Hybrid Retrieval
item.description: “Errors using inadequate data are much less than those using no data at all.” — Charles Babbage
